item.name: Client Management
item.description: Create / Get / Update an OAuth client. Run 'Create client' first, then a flow folder — every flow uses {{client_id}} + {{client_private_key}}. Toggle additionalConfig in the Create body per client type: normal OAuth = pkce_required only; FAPI2 = also require_pushed_authorization_requests + dpop_bound_access_tokens = true.

exec: // Attach the client-mgmt bearer only when set (scope enforcement); otherwise drop it.
// Generates a fresh RSA key and a fresh client_id, then registers the client.
// The private JWK is stored WITHOUT an 'alg' field so the SAME key signs the
// private_key_jwt client assertion as RS256 (OTP/Credentials) or PS256 (FAPI2).
// Edit additionalConfig in the request body for the client type you need.
throw new Error('Update Postman, or set client_private_key + client_public_key + client_id manually.');
const v = bytes instanceof Uint8Array ? bytes : new Uint8Array(bytes);
{ name: 'RSASSA-PKCS1-v1_5', modulusLength: 2048, publicExponent: new Uint8Array([1, 0, 1]), hash: 'SHA-256' },
crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(JSON.stringify({ e: jwk.e, kty: jwk.kty, n: jwk.n }))).then((thumb) => {
kty: jwk.kty, n: jwk.n, e: jwk.e, d: jwk.d,
p: jwk.p, q: jwk.q, dp: jwk.dp, dq: jwk.dq, qi: jwk.qi,
pm.environment.set('client_public_key', JSON.stringify({ kty: jwk.kty, n: jwk.n, e: jwk.e, kid: kid, use: 'sig' }));
if (j.errors && j.errors.length) { throw new Error('client create failed: ' + JSON.stringify(j.errors)); }

body.raw:
{
  "requestTime": "{{client_mgmt_request_time}}",
  "request": {
    "clientId": "{{client_id}}",
    "clientName": "Postman Test Client",
    "clientNameLangMap": { "eng": "Postman Test Client" },
    "relyingPartyId": "{{relying_party_id}}",
    "logoUri": "https://example.com/logo.png",
    "redirectUris": ["{{redirect_uri}}"],
    "userClaims": ["name", "email"],
    "authContextRefs": ["mosip:idp:acr:static-code"],
    "publicKey": {{client_public_key}},
    "grantTypes": ["authorization_code"],
    "clientAuthMethods": ["private_key_jwt"],
    "additionalConfig": { "require_pushed_authorization_requests": false, "dpop_bound_access_tokens": false, "pkce_required": true }
  }
}

exec: if (j.errors && j.errors.length) { throw new Error('client update failed: ' + JSON.stringify(j.errors)); }

item.name: 1 — MOSIP OTP (private_key_jwt)
item.description: Run Client Management > Create client first (additionalConfig: pkce_required only). Then run this folder top-to-bottom.

exec: // PKCE: generate a fresh verifier + S256 challenge for this authorize.
throw new Error('Set individual_id in the environment (MOSIP UIN) before running this folder.');
throw new Error('Set otp in the environment after MOSIP sends the code.');

item.name: 2 — MOSIP Credentials (private_key_jwt)
item.description: Run Client Management > Create client first (additionalConfig: pkce_required only). Then run this folder top-to-bottom.

exec: // PKCE: generate a fresh verifier + S256 challenge for this authorize.
throw new Error('Set individual_id in the environment (MOSIP UIN) before running this folder.');

item.name: 3 — MOSIP FAPI2 flow
item.description: Run Client Management > Create client first with additionalConfig require_pushed_authorization_requests=true AND dpop_bound_access_tokens=true. Then run this folder top-to-bottom. Requires Redis >= 6.2 (PAR uses GETDEL). The PAR/token/userinfo audiences (DPoP htu + client_assertion aud) are read from the par_audience / audience / userinfo_audience environment variables.

exec: // Dynamic PKCE (code_verifier/code_challenge), a fresh DPoP key (dpop_*), and a PS256
// The PAR audience (DPoP htu AND assertion aud) comes from the par_audience env var.
const arr = bytes instanceof Uint8Array ? bytes : new Uint8Array(bytes);
let s = ''; for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(arr[i]);
const data = typeof input === 'string' ? new TextEncoder().encode(input) : input;
async function generateJKT(jwk) { return await sha256b64url(JSON.stringify({ e: jwk.e, kty: jwk.kty, n: jwk.n })); }
{ name: 'RSA-PSS', modulusLength: 2048, publicExponent: new Uint8Array([0x01, 0x00, 0x01]), hash: 'SHA-256' },
const publicJwk = { e: exportedPub.e, kty: exportedPub.kty, n: exportedPub.n };
const header = { typ: 'dpop+jwt', alg: 'PS256', jwk: publicJwk };
const payload = { jti: crypto.randomUUID(), htm: pm.request.method.toUpperCase(), htu: parAudience, iat: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) };
const sig = await crypto.subtle.sign({ name: 'RSA-PSS', saltLength: 32 }, keyPair.privateKey, new TextEncoder().encode(signingInput));
const privateKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', privateJwk, { name: 'RSA-PSS', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const payload = { iss: clientId, sub: clientId, aud: audience, jti: crypto.randomUUID(), iat: now, exp: now + 60 };
const sig = await crypto.subtle.sign({ name: 'RSA-PSS', saltLength: 32 }, privateKey, new TextEncoder().encode(signingInput));
if (err) console.log('OAuth ERROR:', err, '-', url.searchParams.get('error_description') || url.searchParams.get('errorMessage'));
pm.test('no error redirect', () => pm.expect(err, 'authorize returned an error redirect').to.be.null);
throw new Error('Set individual_id in the environment (MOSIP UIN) before running this folder.');
throw new Error('Set otp in the environment after MOSIP sends the code.');
// DPoP proof for the token endpoint (reuses the key from Initiate PAR) + PS256
// The token audience (DPoP htu AND assertion aud) comes from the audience env var.
const arr = bytes instanceof Uint8Array ? bytes : new Uint8Array(bytes);
let s = ''; for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(arr[i]);
const data = typeof input === 'string' ? new TextEncoder().encode(input) : input;
async function generateJKT(jwk) { return await sha256b64url(JSON.stringify({ e: jwk.e, kty: jwk.kty, n: jwk.n })); }
const privateKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', privateJwk, { name: 'RSA-PSS', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const header = { typ: 'dpop+jwt', alg: 'PS256', jwk: { e: publicJwk.e, kty: publicJwk.kty, n: publicJwk.n } };
const payload = { jti: crypto.randomUUID(), htm: 'POST', htu: tokenAudience, iat: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) };
const sig = await crypto.subtle.sign({ name: 'RSA-PSS', saltLength: 32 }, privateKey, new TextEncoder().encode(signingInput));
const privateKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', privateJwk, { name: 'RSA-PSS', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const payload = { iss: clientId, sub: clientId, aud: audience, jti: crypto.randomUUID(), iat: now, exp: now + 60 };
const sig = await crypto.subtle.sign({ name: 'RSA-PSS', saltLength: 32 }, privateKey, new TextEncoder().encode(signingInput));
// DPoP proof for userinfo (ath = SHA-256 of the access token).
// The userinfo audience (DPoP htu) comes from the userinfo_audience env var.
const arr = bytes instanceof Uint8Array ? bytes : new Uint8Array(bytes);
let s = ''; for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) s += String.fromCharCode(arr[i]);
const data = typeof input === 'string' ? new TextEncoder().encode(input) : input;
const privateKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', privateJwk, { name: 'RSA-PSS', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign']);
const header = { typ: 'dpop+jwt', alg: 'PS256', jwk: { e: publicJwk.e, kty: publicJwk.kty, n: publicJwk.n } };
const payload = { jti: crypto.randomUUID(), htm: pm.request.method.toUpperCase(), htu: userinfoAudience, iat: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000), ath: await sha256b64url(accessToken) };
const sig = await crypto.subtle.sign({ name: 'RSA-PSS', saltLength: 32 }, privateKey, new TextEncoder().encode(signingInput));
// Collection-level pre-request. Runs before EVERY request; no-ops on everything
// except a request literally named 'Token' (OTP + Credentials folders). Signs the
// private_key_jwt client_assertion (RS256) with client_private_key. FAPI2 builds
// its own PS256 assertions per request, so this no-ops there.
const view = bytes instanceof Uint8Array ? bytes : new Uint8Array(bytes);
const jwk = typeof raw === 'string' ? JSON.parse(raw) : raw;
throw new Error('Expected an RSA private JWK with kty, n, e, and d');
if (!clientId) { throw new Error('client_id is not set — run Client Management > Create client first'); }
if (!clientJwkRaw) { throw new Error('client_private_key is not set — run Client Management > Create client first'); }
if (!jwk.kid) { throw new Error('Private JWK must include kid'); }
const header = { alg: 'RS256', typ: 'JWT', kid: jwk.kid };
const payload = { iss: clientId, sub: clientId, aud: audience, jti: pm.variables.replaceIn('{{$guid}}'), iat: now, exp: now + 300 };
return crypto.subtle.importKey('jwk', jwk, { name: 'RSASSA-PKCS1-v1_5', hash: 'SHA-256' }, false, ['sign'])
